rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KENT CHI KIN SUN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Second General Demurrer And Motion To Strike Of Administrator To Request For Stay; Request For Dismissal, Etc.
rulings.Rulings: The Second General Demurrer against Petitioners' Notice of Filing of Complaint to Quiet Title to Real Property is overruled. Respondent is improperly demurring to the Notice instead of the Complaint itself, which is filed in civil court, not probate court. Respondent's Motion to Strike Petitioners' Request to Stay probate proceedings is denied. Respondent's request for jury trial on the issues of ownership and possession of real property is denied. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the Court's tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 1/28/2015, at 4:00 p.m. The argument (if any) will be scheduled for February 4, 2015, at 3:00 p.m. No argument will occur on January 29, 2015.
